nasb.text: Now the Philistines were fighting against Israel, and the men of Israel fled from before the Philistines and fell slain on Mount Gilboa.

esv.text: Now the Philistines were fighting against Israel, and the men of Israel fled before the Philistines and fell slain on Mount Gilboa.

cnv.text: 非利士人與以色列人交戰。以色列人從非利士人面前逃跑，有很多人在基利波山上倒斃。

ccb.text: 非利士人与以色列人交战，以色列人败逃，许多人在基利波山被杀。
